task:
Investigate why interactive_shell tool is not appearing in the orchestrator tool set after adding it. Check:

1. Read ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/interactive-shell-tool.ts — verify the export is correct (should export registerInteractiveShellTool)
2. Read ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/registration-hub.ts — verify import and call are correct
3. Read ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/index.ts lines 75-90 (activeTools section) and lines 125-140 (tool_call allowlist) — verify both edits are present
4. Check if there are any TypeScript errors: cd ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30
5. Check pi logs for extension errors: ls ~/.pi/agent/logs/ and read any recent log files
6. Check if the extension compiles: ls ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/dist/ or check package.json for build scripts

Report exact findings — what's present, what's missing, any errors.
